description: CompositionWhite round neck top made of 100% cotton, has a ruffled and elasticated neck with satin tie-ups, three quarter sleeves with ruffles and elasticated cuff and elasticated waistFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's understated trend is nailed in this luxe top with its plush fabric.
